DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
SUI-CHIH HSU, 508-0891, PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY APPEARING IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITH INTERPRETER, SCOTT HSU

PLAINTIFF DID NOT NOTIFY THE OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS APPEARANCE. ARGUMENT WAS NOT CONSIDERED. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DIE FEN ZHEN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with five days leave to amend. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
